headline: Bring your patio back.
subhead: Pressure wash and fresh polymer sand. Recommended every 2 to 3 years to keep weeds out of the joints and the color crisp.

pairs.title: Weed-choked walkway
pairs.caption: Joint weeds and grime out. Color back.

pairs.title: Garden gate walkway
pairs.caption: Through the gate, joint by joint.

pairs.title: Sunken paver repair
pairs.caption: Pulled, re-leveled, and washed. The clean side speaks for itself.

pairs.title: Polymer sand close-up
pairs.caption: Polymer sand swept into clean joints — locks the surface for years.

pairs.title: Custom poured patio + paint
pairs.caption: Custom-poured concrete patio with brick soldier-course border. Sealed and color-coated.

supervisor.title: Linux — Site Supervisor
supervisor.caption: On every job. Approves all paver work.
